allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(security\): address vulnerabilities and improve code quality

- Fix mass assignment vulnerability in event type creation endpoints
  by sanitizing input with allowed field lists
- Add URL validation \(http/https only\) to Company and Branch models
  for website, menu, backgroundImage, logo, qrBackgroundImage fields
- Add hex color validation to fontColor and textColor fields
- Fix IDOR vulnerability in DELETE /resources/.../config endpoint
  by adding permission checks via checkResourcePermission middleware
- Create reusable checkResourcePermission\(\) middleware and parseResourceId\(\)
  helper to reduce code duplication
- Add ResourceTypes constants and VALIDATION_PATTERNS for consistency
- Optimize N+1 query problem in eventConfig service by batch-loading
  all configurations in a single query with O\(1\) Map lookup
- Add database transaction support to createDefaultEventTypes for atomicity
- Reduce verbose logging in production with debugLog\(\) helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
